MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF PATRICK MCDERMOTTMotion For Attorney'S Fees (C.C.P. 1021.5).
APPEARANCES: John P. Baba, Esq. of Wiegel & Frued, LLP for petitioner and moving party; Andrew W. Schwatz, Esq. for respondent and opposing party.
Ruling: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Both sides to submit proposed orders. (302/REQ/JT) REPORTER: BELDON YEE CSR #2647

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Sep-14-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration

Appearances: Andrew W. Schwartz, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Office of the City Attorney, City Hall, Room 234, 1 Dr. Carlton B. Goodlett Place, San Francisco, CA 94102, 415-554-4620, appearing on behalf of respondent and moving party City and County of San Francisco.. John P. Baba, Esq. WIEGEL & FRIED, 414 Gough Street, San Francisco, CA 94102, 415-552-8230, on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party McDermott.

The Court requested that counsel meet and confer on the order. Defendant's motion for reconsideration was GRANTED pursuant to the stipulation of the parties. Parties will submit preemptory writ, etc. Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. Reported by Beldon Yee CSR# 2647. (302/REQ/HE)
